title: rubus vulgaris var. silvaticus
intro: Rubus vulgaris var. silvaticus, also known as wild raspberry, is a variety of the common raspberry plant found in the wild. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus vulgaris var. silvaticus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as aiding in the prevention of certain cancers and neurological disorders. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for medicinal purposes, with some herbalists also using it in salves and creams to soothe skin conditions.
